title: QUIC Connection Runtime Endpoint Ingress Verification
verification_method: Focused requirement-home tests and inspection evidence from the endpoint ingress classifier, route registries, and reset-token registry.
expected_result: Version negotiation and retry stay endpoint-handled, long and short packets route to the correct runtime, malformed or unknown datagrams stay unroutable, stateless resets match only the current remote address and live binding, stateless-reset emission remains bounded to avoid loops or oracle behavior, and explicit effects retire route and token ownership cleanly.
procedure: Run the endpoint ingress requirement-home tests for REQ-QUIC-CRT-0002, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0012, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0013, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0014, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0015, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0016, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0080, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0082, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0083, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0085, and REQ-QUIC-CRT-0086.
Confirm the routed cases deliver `QuicConnectionPacketReceivedEvent` to the correct runtime and the reset cases only match when the endpoint binding and token ownership are current.
Confirm discard and retire effects remove the endpoint-owned route and token entries before later datagrams are retried.
Confirm the endpoint emission policy rejects reset responses that would violate loop-prevention or per-remote-address send limits.
scope: This slice covers ingress classification, routing, endpoint-owned stateless-reset bookkeeping, and the endpoint emission policy that bounds reset send frequency. It does not prove the broader connection lifecycle or migration policy.
status_summary: Passed on 2026-04-30. The focused CRT endpoint-ingress requirement-home filter passed 20/20, covering version-negotiation classification before routing, route-before-reset handling for known short-header traffic, route-miss stateless-reset screening, endpoint-scoped concurrent route/token registries, destination-CID routing, reset-token scoping, binding retargeting, token retirement, emission limiting, and connection-ID retirement cleanup. This does not prove broader connection lifecycle or migration policy.
preconditions: The CRT requirement traits are discoverable by the test runner.
The endpoint ingress wrapper remains internal and the endpoint-owned registries stay isolated from connection-owned state.
